rules.name: Is rule0 active
rules.rule: rule0act=ddm(1), g_rule0act = -1: if(g_rule0act != rule0act, g_rule0act = rule0act)

rules.name: Subscribe to smarteco parameter
rules.rule: sysappl0smarteco, g_sysappl0smarteco = -1: if(g_sysappl0smarteco != sysappl0smarteco, g_sysappl0smarteco = sysappl0smarteco, g_determine_smart_eco_status = 1)

rules.name: Subscribe to 'Charge detected' parameter
rules.rule: mbat0chgdet, g_mbat0chgdet = -1: if(g_mbat0chgdet != mbat0chgdet, g_mbat0chgdet = mbat0chgdet, g_reset_state_by_temp_or_chgdet = g_determine_smart_eco_status = 1)

rules.name: Subscribe to 'Relative capacity' parameter
rules.rule: mbat0caprel, g_mbat0caprel = -1: if(g_mbat0caprel != mbat0caprel, g_mbat0caprel = mbat0caprel, g_determine_caprel = 1)

rules.name: Subscribe to ac0on
rules.rule: ac0on, g_ac0on = -1: if(g_ac0on != ac0on, g_ac0on = ac0on, g_on_has_changed = g_determine_smart_eco_status = 1)

rules.name: Subscribe to ac0sleep
rules.rule: ac0sleep, g_prev_ac0sleep_state = -1, g_ac0sleep = -1: if(g_ac0sleep != ac0sleep, g_ac0sleep = ac0sleep, g_determine_smart_eco_status = 1)

rules.name: Subscribe to ac0md
rules.rule: ac0md, g_ac0md = -1, g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit = -1: if(g_ac0md != ac0md, g_ac0md = ac0md, g_reset_state_by_mode = g_determine_smart_eco_status = 1)

rules.name: Subscribe to ac0fspd
rules.rule: ac0fspd, g_ac0fspd = -1: if(g_ac0fspd != ac0fspd, g_ac0fspd = ac0fspd, g_determine_smart_eco_status = 1)

rules.name: Subscribe to ac0operst
rules.rule: ac0operst, g_ac0operst = -1: if(g_ac0operst != ac0operst, g_ac0operst = ac0operst, g_operst_has_changed = g_determine_smart_eco_status = 1)

rules.name: Subscribe to ac0offset
rules.rule: ac0offset, g_temp_offset = 0: g_temp_offset = ac0offset

rules.name: Subscribe to ac0itemp
rules.rule: ac0itemp, g_ac0itemp = 0: g_ac0itemp = ac0itemp

rules.name: Subscribe to ac0ttemp
rules.rule: ac0ttemp, g_ac0ttemp = 0: if(g_ac0ttemp != ac0ttemp, g_ac0ttemp = ac0ttemp, g_reset_state_by_temp_or_chgdet = g_determine_smart_eco_status = 1)

rules.name: Turn off smartEco on rule0act request
rules.rule: g_rule0act: if(g_rule0act == 0, g_trig_rules_smarteco_off = 1, g_sysappl0smarteco = 0, pub(sysappl0smarteco = g_sysappl0smarteco))

rules.name: Reset state by AC off
rules.rule: g_on_has_changed: if(g_ac0on == 0, g_reset_state_by_smarteco_off = 1, pub(sysappl0smarteco = 0))

rules.comment: Shut down AC if SOC is below 5%
rules.name: SOC <= 5%
rules.rule: g_determine_caprel: if(g_mbat0caprel <= 5, pub(ac0on = 0, sysappl0smarteco = 0))

rules.name: SOC > 5%
rules.rule: g_determine_caprel: if(g_mbat0caprel > 5, g_determine_smart_eco_status = 1)

rules.comment: trig set of rules if SmartEco is turned ON/OFF when AC is ON
rules.name: Determine SmartEco status
rules.rule: g_determine_smart_eco_status: if(sysappl0smarteco == 0 || sysappl0smarteco == 2, g_trig_rules_smarteco_off = 1), if(g_ac0on == 1 && sysappl0smarteco == 1, g_trig_rules_smarteco_on = 1)

rules.comment: SmastECO OFF: Do nothing, normal operation is enabled, so we do not override AC0 parameters
rules.name: trig set of rules if SmartECO is OFF
rules.rule: g_trig_rules_smarteco_off : g_prev_ac0sleep_state = g_ac0sleep, g_reset_state_by_smarteco_off = g_reset_forced_fan_to_prev_md = 1

rules.name: Reset by settemp or chgdet
rules.rule: g_reset_state_by_temp_or_chgdet: g_old_state = g_current_state = 0

rules.comment: Keep forced mode when switching between modes cooling/dry->forced fan, since SHAPE will publish back FAN mode
rules.name: Reset state by mode
rules.rule: g_reset_state_by_mode: if((g_current_state != g_trig_cool_nch_10_30) && (g_current_state != g_trig_cool_ch_20_40) && (g_current_state != g_trig_dry_nch_10_30) && (g_current_state != g_trig_dry_ch_20_40), g_ac0md_fan_mode_forced = -1)

rules.comment: If auto mode was enabled and we had to shut down the compressor, SHAPE will publish back FAN mode. Keep the flag on indicating that auto mode is enabled, so we can return to previos state if charging state switches from non-charging to charging
rules.name: Reset auto mode flag by mode update
rules.rule: g_reset_state_by_mode: if(g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit != -1 && g_ac0md_fan_mode_forced == -1, g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit = -1)

rules.name: Reset state by mode
rules.rule: g_reset_state_by_mode: g_temp_offset = g_old_state = g_current_state = 0

rules.name: Reset temperature offset by AC OPERST
rules.rule: g_operst_has_changed: g_temp_offset = 0

rules.name: Reset mode back to Cooling if Fan mode was forced while Cooling
rules.rule: g_reset_forced_fan_to_prev_md: if((g_ac0md_fan_mode_forced == 0 && g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit == -1) && ((g_current_state == g_trig_cool_nch_10_30) || (g_current_state == g_trig_cool_ch_20_40)), pub(ac0md = 0))

rules.name: Reset mode back to Auto if Fan mode was forced while Auto mode enabled
rules.rule: g_reset_forced_fan_to_prev_md: if((g_ac0md_fan_mode_forced == 0 && g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit == 0) && ((g_current_state == g_trig_cool_nch_10_30) || (g_current_state == g_trig_cool_ch_20_40)), pub(ac0md = 3))

rules.name: Reset mode back to Dry if Fan mode was forced while Dry mode enabled
rules.rule: g_reset_forced_fan_to_prev_md: if((g_ac0md_fan_mode_forced == 4) && ((g_current_state == g_trig_dry_nch_10_30) || (g_current_state == g_trig_dry_ch_20_40)), pub(ac0md = 4))

rules.name: Reset state by smartEco off
rules.rule: g_reset_state_by_smarteco_off: g_temp_offset = g_old_state = g_current_state = 0, g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit = g_ac0md_fan_mode_forced = -1, pub(ac0offset = g_temp_offset)

rules.comment: Detect state depending on Charger and mode
rules.name: Auto and FanOnly, inherit Fan mode
rules.rule: g_trig_rules_smarteco_on: if(g_ac0md == 3 && g_ac0operst == 0, g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit = 2)

rules.name: Auto and Cool, inherit Cool mode
rules.rule: g_trig_rules_smarteco_on: if(g_ac0md == 3 && g_ac0operst == 1, g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit = 0)

rules.name: Auto and Heat, inherit Heat mode
rules.rule: g_trig_rules_smarteco_on: if(g_ac0md == 3 && g_ac0operst == 2, g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit = 1)

rules.name: Cooling and not charging
rules.rule: g_trig_rules_smarteco_on: if((g_ac0md == 0 || g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit == 0 || g_ac0md_fan_mode_forced == 0) && g_mbat0chgdet == 0, g_trig_cool_nch = 1)

rules.name: Cooling and charging
rules.rule: g_trig_rules_smarteco_on: if((g_ac0md == 0 || g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit == 0 || g_ac0md_fan_mode_forced == 0) && g_mbat0chgdet == 1, g_trig_cool_ch = 1)

rules.name: Heating and not charging
rules.rule: g_trig_rules_smarteco_on: if((g_ac0md == 1 || g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit == 1) && g_mbat0chgdet == 0, g_trig_heat_nch = 1)

rules.name: Heating and charging
rules.rule: g_trig_rules_smarteco_on: if((g_ac0md == 1 || g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit == 1) && g_mbat0chgdet == 1, g_trig_heat_ch = 1)

rules.name: Dry mode and not charging
rules.rule: g_trig_rules_smarteco_on: if((g_ac0md == 4 || g_ac0md_fan_mode_forced == 4) && g_mbat0chgdet == 0, g_trig_dry_nch = 1)

rules.name: Dry mode and not charging
rules.rule: g_trig_rules_smarteco_on: if((g_ac0md == 4 || g_ac0md_fan_mode_forced == 4) && g_mbat0chgdet == 1, g_trig_dry_ch = 1)

rules.name: Fan mode and not charging
rules.rule: g_trig_rules_smarteco_on: if(((g_ac0md == 2 && g_ac0md_fan_mode_forced == -1) || (g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit == 2)) && g_mbat0chgdet == 0, g_trig_fan_nch = 1)

rules.name: Fan mode and charging
rules.rule: g_trig_rules_smarteco_on: if(((g_ac0md == 2 && g_ac0md_fan_mode_forced == -1) || (g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit == 2)) && g_mbat0chgdet == 1, g_trig_fan_ch = 1)

rules.comment: Determine SOC state and trig rules only if state has changed
rules.name: Cooling and not charging SOC state (5, 10]
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_nch, g_trig_cool_nch_10 = 1: if(g_mbat0caprel <= 10, if(g_current_state != g_trig_cool_nch_10, g_current_state = g_trig_cool_nch_10 = 1))

rules.name: Cooling and not charging SOC state (10, 30]
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_nch, g_trig_cool_nch_10_30 = 2: if(g_mbat0caprel > 10 && g_mbat0caprel <= 30, if(g_current_state != g_trig_cool_nch_10_30, g_current_state = g_trig_cool_nch_10_30 = 2), g_set_fanspeed = 1)

rules.name: Cooling and not charging SOC state (30, 50]
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_nch, g_trig_cool_nch_30_50 = 3: if(g_mbat0caprel > 30 && g_mbat0caprel <= 50, if(g_current_state != g_trig_cool_nch_30_50, g_current_state = g_trig_cool_nch_30_50 = 3), g_prev_ac0sleep_state = g_ac0sleep)

rules.name: Cooling and not charging SOC state (50, 100]
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_nch, g_trig_cool_nch_50_100 = 4: if(g_mbat0caprel > 50 && g_mbat0caprel <= 100, if(g_current_state != g_trig_cool_nch_50_100, g_current_state = g_trig_cool_nch_50_100 = 4))

rules.name: Cooling and charging SOC state (5, 20]
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_ch, g_trig_cool_ch_20 = 5: if(g_mbat0caprel <= 20, if(g_current_state != g_trig_cool_ch_20, g_current_state = g_trig_cool_ch_20 = 5))

rules.name: Cooling and charging SOC state (20, 40]
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_ch, g_trig_cool_ch_20_40 = 6: if(g_mbat0caprel > 20 && g_mbat0caprel <= 40, if(g_current_state != g_trig_cool_ch_20_40, g_current_state = g_trig_cool_ch_20_40 = 6), g_set_fanspeed = 1)

rules.name: Cooling and charging SOC state (40, 60]
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_ch, g_trig_cool_ch_40_60 = 7: if(g_mbat0caprel > 40 && g_mbat0caprel <= 60, if(g_current_state != g_trig_cool_ch_40_60, g_current_state = g_trig_cool_ch_40_60 = 7))

rules.name: Cooling and charging SOC state (60, 100]
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_ch, g_trig_cool_ch_60_100 = 8: if(g_mbat0caprel > 60 && g_mbat0caprel <= 100, if(g_current_state != g_trig_cool_ch_60_100, g_current_state = g_trig_cool_ch_60_100 = 8))

rules.name: Heating and not charging SOC state (5, 20]
rules.rule: g_trig_heat_nch, g_trig_heat_nch_20 = 9: if(g_mbat0caprel <= 20, if(g_current_state != g_trig_heat_nch_20, g_current_state = g_trig_heat_nch_20 = 9))

rules.name: Heating and not charging SOC state (20, 50]
rules.rule: g_trig_heat_nch, g_trig_heat_nch_20_50 = 11: if(g_mbat0caprel > 20 && g_mbat0caprel <= 50, if(g_current_state != g_trig_heat_nch_20_50, g_current_state = g_trig_heat_nch_20_50 = 11))

rules.name: Heating and not charging SOC state (50, 100]
rules.rule: g_trig_heat_nch, g_trig_heat_nch_50_100 = 12: if(g_mbat0caprel > 50 && g_mbat0caprel <= 100, if(g_current_state != g_trig_heat_nch_50_100, g_current_state = g_trig_heat_nch_50_100 = 12))

rules.name: Heating and charging SOC state (5, 30]
rules.rule: g_trig_heat_ch, g_trig_heat_ch_30 = 13: if(g_mbat0caprel <= 30, if(g_current_state != g_trig_heat_ch_30, g_current_state = g_trig_heat_ch_30 = 13))

rules.name: Heating and charging SOC state (30, 60]
rules.rule: g_trig_heat_ch, g_trig_heat_ch_30_60 = 14: if(g_mbat0caprel > 30 && g_mbat0caprel <= 60, if(g_current_state != g_trig_heat_ch_30_60, g_current_state = g_trig_heat_ch_30_60 = 14))

rules.name: Heating and charging SOC state (60, 100]
rules.rule: g_trig_heat_ch, g_trig_heat_ch_60_100 = 15: if(g_mbat0caprel > 60 && g_mbat0caprel <= 100, if(g_current_state != g_trig_heat_ch_60_100, g_current_state = g_trig_heat_ch_60_100 = 15))

rules.name: Fan mode and not charging SOC (5, 10]
rules.rule: g_trig_fan_nch, g_trig_fan_nch_10 = 16: if(g_mbat0caprel <= 10, if(g_current_state != g_trig_fan_nch_10, g_current_state = g_trig_fan_nch_10 = 16))

rules.name: Fan mode and not charging SOC (10, 100]
rules.rule: g_trig_fan_nch, g_trig_fan_nch_10_100 = 17: if(g_mbat0caprel > 10 && g_mbat0caprel <= 100, if(g_current_state != g_trig_fan_nch_10_100, g_current_state = g_trig_fan_nch_10_100 = 17))

rules.name: Fan mode and charging SOC (5, 20]
rules.rule: g_trig_fan_ch, g_trig_fan_ch_20 = 18: if(g_mbat0caprel <= 20, if(g_current_state != g_trig_fan_ch_20, g_current_state = g_trig_fan_ch_20 = 18))

rules.name: Fan mode and charging SOC (20, 100]
rules.rule: g_trig_fan_ch, g_trig_fan_ch_20_100 = 19: if(g_mbat0caprel > 20 && g_mbat0caprel <= 100, if(g_current_state != g_trig_fan_ch_20_100, g_current_state = g_trig_fan_ch_20_100 = 19))

rules.name: Dry mode and not charging SOC (5, 10]
rules.rule: g_trig_dry_nch, g_trig_dry_nch_10 = 20: if(g_mbat0caprel <= 10, if(g_current_state != g_trig_dry_nch_10, g_current_state = g_trig_dry_nch_10 = 20))

rules.name: Dry mode and not charging SOC (10, 30]
rules.rule: g_trig_dry_nch, g_trig_dry_nch_10_30 = 21: if(g_mbat0caprel > 10 && g_mbat0caprel <= 30, if(g_current_state != g_trig_dry_nch_10_30, g_current_state = g_trig_dry_nch_10_30 = 21), g_set_fanspeed = 1)

rules.name: Dry mode and not charging SOC (30, 100]
rules.rule: g_trig_dry_nch, g_trig_dry_nch_30_100 = 22: if(g_mbat0caprel > 30 && g_mbat0caprel <= 100, if(g_current_state != g_trig_dry_nch_30_100, g_current_state = g_trig_dry_nch_30_100 = 22))

rules.name: Dry mode and charging SOC (5, 20]
rules.rule: g_trig_dry_ch, g_trig_dry_ch_20 = 23: if(g_mbat0caprel <= 20, if(g_current_state != g_trig_dry_ch_20, g_current_state = g_trig_dry_ch_20 = 23))

rules.name: Dry mode and charging SOC (20, 40]
rules.rule: g_trig_dry_ch, g_trig_dry_ch_20_40 = 24: if(g_mbat0caprel > 20 && g_mbat0caprel <= 40, if(g_current_state != g_trig_dry_ch_20_40, g_current_state = g_trig_dry_ch_20_40 = 24), g_set_fanspeed = 1)

rules.name: Dry mode and charging SOC (40, 100]
rules.rule: g_trig_dry_ch, g_trig_dry_ch_40_100 = 25: if(g_mbat0caprel > 40 && g_mbat0caprel <= 100, if(g_current_state != g_trig_dry_ch_40_100, g_current_state = g_trig_dry_ch_40_100 = 25))

rules.comment: Cooling while not charging/charging set of rules: Calculate temperature offset
rules.name: Temp offset: Internal above Set temp
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_nch_10_30, g_trig_cool_nch_30_50, g_trig_cool_ch_20_40, g_trig_cool_ch_40_60, mask=['or']: if((ac0itemp + 2000) >= (ac0ttemp + 4000), g_temp_offset = 4000)

rules.name: Temp offset: Internal below Set temp
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_nch_10_30, g_trig_cool_nch_30_50, g_trig_cool_ch_20_40, g_trig_cool_ch_40_60, mask=['or']: if((ac0itemp + 2000) < (ac0ttemp + 4000), g_temp_offset = 2000)

rules.name: Temp offset: 2
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_nch_50_100, g_trig_cool_ch_60_100, mask=['or']: g_temp_offset = 2000

rules.comment: Heating while not charging/charging set of rules: Calculate temperature offset
rules.name: Temp offset: Internal above Set temp
rules.rule: g_trig_heat_nch_20_50, g_trig_heat_ch_30_60, mask=['or']: if((ac0itemp - 2000) >= (ac0ttemp - 4000), g_temp_offset = -4000)

rules.name: Temp offset: Internal below Set temp
rules.rule: g_trig_heat_nch_20_50, g_trig_heat_ch_30_60, mask=['or']: if((ac0itemp - 2000) < (ac0ttemp - 4000), g_temp_offset = -2000)

rules.name: Temp offset: -2
rules.rule: g_trig_heat_nch_50_100, g_trig_heat_ch_60_100, mask=['or']: g_temp_offset = -2000

rules.comment: Cooling/Heating/Fan/Dry while not charging/charging set of rules: Set AC to desired state
rules.name: Cooling/Heating and not charging, SOC(5, 10]/SOC(5, 20] or charging, SOC(5, 20]/SOC(5, 30]
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_nch_10, g_trig_cool_ch_20, g_trig_heat_nch_20, g_trig_heat_ch_30, g_trig_dry_nch_10, g_trig_dry_ch_20, g_trig_fan_nch_10, g_trig_fan_ch_20, mask=['or']: pub(ac0on = 0, sysappl0smarteco = 0)

rules.name: Cooling/Dry and not charging, SOC(10, 30]/SOC(10, 30] or charging SOC(20, 40]/SOC(20, 40]
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_nch_10_30, g_trig_cool_ch_20_40, g_trig_dry_nch_10_30, g_trig_dry_ch_20_40, mask=['or']: pub(ac0md = 2, ac0offset = g_temp_offset)

rules.name: Cooling/Heating and not charging and SOC(30, 50]/SOC(20, 50] or heating charging, SOC(30, 60]
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_nch_30_50, g_trig_heat_nch_20_50, g_trig_heat_ch_30_60, mask=['or']: pub(ac0offset = g_temp_offset)

rules.name: Cooling and charging and SOC(40, 60]
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_ch_40_60: if(g_old_state == g_trig_cool_ch_20_40 && g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit == -1, pub(ac0md = 0)), pub(ac0offset = g_temp_offset)

rules.comment: Inherited Cooling. Set it back to AUTO.
rules.name: Cooling and charging and SOC(40, 60]
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_ch_40_60: if(g_old_state == g_trig_cool_ch_20_40 && g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit == 0, pub(ac0md = 3)), pub(ac0offset = g_temp_offset)

rules.comment: Swtich AC mode to Dry from forced FAN mode
rules.name: Dry and charging SOC(40, 100]
rules.rule: g_trig_dry_ch_40_100: if(g_old_state == g_trig_dry_ch_20_40, pub(ac0md = 4))

rules.name: Cooling/Heating and not charging, SOC(50, 100]/SOC(50, 100] or charging, SOC(60, 100]/SOC(60, 100]
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_nch_50_100, g_trig_cool_ch_60_100, g_trig_heat_nch_50_100, g_trig_heat_ch_60_100, g_trig_fan_nch_10_100, g_trig_fan_ch_20_100, g_trig_dry_nch_30_100, g_trig_dry_ch_40_100, mask=['or']: pub(ac0offset = g_temp_offset)

rules.name: if cool: Store current actual mode
rules.rule: g_trig_cool_nch_10_30, g_trig_cool_ch_20_40, mask=['or']: g_ac0md_fan_mode_forced = 0

rules.name: elif dry: Store current_actual mode
rules.rule: g_trig_dry_nch_10_30, g_trig_dry_ch_20_40, mask=['or']: g_ac0md_fan_mode_forced = 4

rules.comment: Override fan speed for certain battery levels. Sleep will be the first parameter published by SHAPE(ON to OFF) whenever mode is changed, so we have to use previos sleep state
rules.name: Sleep OFF: Override fan speed for Cooling mode to AUTO
rules.rule: g_set_fanspeed: if(g_prev_ac0sleep_state == 0 && g_ac0md_fan_mode_forced == 0, pub(ac0fspd = 5))

rules.name: Sleep OFF: Override fan speed for Dry mode to LOW, when switching to FAN mode due to SOC reduction
rules.rule: g_set_fanspeed: if(g_prev_ac0sleep_state == 0 && g_ac0md_fan_mode_forced == 4, pub(ac0fspd = 0))

rules.name: Sleep ON: Override fan speed to LOW
rules.rule: g_set_fanspeed: if(g_prev_ac0sleep_state == 1, pub(ac0fspd = 0))

rules.name: Debug
rules.rule: g_trig_rules_smarteco_on: if(g_old_state != g_current_state, print(g_current_state, ac0md, g_ac0md_auto_md_inherit, g_ac0md_fan_mode_forced, ac0fspd, ac0offset))

rules.name: Store current state
rules.rule: g_trig_rules_smarteco_on: g_old_state = g_current_state
